_description: Configuration file for the diffusion-simulator test suite.
_instructions: Add or remove libraries under 'libraries' to automatically generate corresponding import and availability tests. Add or remove scripts under 'scripts' to enable/disable unit tests for that module.

scripts.description: DDPM forward diffusion + reverse process + visualization

test_beta_schedule.description: Verify beta schedule is linear from 0.02 to 0.5 over 5 steps

test_alpha_bar_calculation.description: Verify alpha_bar = cumprod(1 - beta) is computed correctly

test_forward_diffusion_step.description: Verify forward step: x_t = sqrt(1-beta_t)*x_{t-1} + sqrt(beta_t)*noise

test_reverse_process.description: Verify reverse (denoising) process produces correct shape output

test_mse_degradation.description: Verify MSE increases monotonically with diffusion steps

test_plot_generation.description: Verify the 3-panel plot is created without errors

test_csv_output_created.description: Verify CSV file is created after running simulations

test_csv_header.description: Verify CSV contains expected column headers

test_csv_row_count.description: Verify CSV has correct number of rows (runs * (steps+1))

test_deterministic_reproducibility.description: Verify same seed produces identical results

test_degradation_values.description: Verify MSE and L2 distance values are non-negative

scripts.description: Analysis of simulation CSV with plots

test_csv_loading.description: Verify CSV can be loaded with pandas

test_aggregation_shape.description: Verify groupby aggregation returns correct number of steps

test_expected_mse_computation.description: Verify expected MSE matches theoretical formula

test_analysis_plot_creation.description: Verify the 4-panel analysis plot is created without errors
